case_title: PROVIDENT CREDIT UNION VS. FLORENCE EDGECOMBE

docket_entries.description: PLAINTIFF DID NOT APPEAR. DEFENDANT APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY HER DAUGHTER, ELAINE EDGECOMBE. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
